info.name: Diagramming
info.summary: Create and edit diagrams and whiteboards in Nextcloud
info.description:
Integrates the diagrams.net diagram editor with Nextcloud. Users can create and edit .drawio diagrams and .dwb whiteboards directly within the Nextcloud file manager.
**Features:**
- Create and edit diagrams and whiteboards from the Nextcloud "+" menu - Click any .drawio or .dwb file to open the editor inline - Autosave with optimistic conflict detection - Inline diagram previews in Text, Collectives, Talk, Notes, and Deck - Supports public share links (read-only and editable) - Offline mode for privacy-sensitive deployments - Configurable editor URL for self-hosted diagrams.net instances
info.author: draw.io Ltd
